ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., University, College) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "pincode" INTEGER /* Pincode of the institution */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the institution is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the institution is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the institution */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accreditations" (
  "accreditation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accreditation */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution being accredited */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accrediting agency */,
  "accreditation_type" TEXT /* Type of accreditation (e.g., NAAC, NBA, ABET) */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start date of the accreditation validity period */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* End date of the accreditation validity period */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade awarded to the institution (e.g., A, A+, B+) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accreditation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accreditations_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accreditations_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the accrediting agency */,
  "agency_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade (e.g., A, A+, B+) */,
  "grade_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cycle" (
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cycle */,
  "accreditation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accreditation being cycled */,
  "cycle_name" TEXT /* Name of the cycle (e.g., First Cycle, Second Cycle) */,
  "cycle_year" INTEGER /* Year the cycle began */,
  "cycle_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the cycle (e.g., 5 years, 10 years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cycle_accreditation_id FOREIGN KEY ("accreditation_id") REFERENCES accreditations ("accreditation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution being measured */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., CGPA, Graduation Rate) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "cgpa" REAL /* CGPA of the institution */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "accreditation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accreditation the document belongs to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* Path to the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., Accreditation Certificate, Grade Sheet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_accreditation_id FOREIGN KEY ("accreditation_id") REFERENCES accreditations ("accreditation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, institution official, public) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the institution data */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the institution data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the institution data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution being updated */,
  "field_changed" TEXT /* Field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "date_changed" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the report is about */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_path" TEXT /* Path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Institution Performance Report, Accreditation Summary Report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)
